name: Small Agri-Biodiesel Producer Credit

eligibility.description: Available to producers with less than 60 million gallons of capacity, limited to the first 15 million gallons produced annually through 2026.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A 20 cents per gallon credit for qualified agri-biodiesel production for producers with a capacity not exceeding 60 million gallons.
